scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace=@tourcompanion/web && node copy-web.mjs && node build.mjs
scripts.build:ios: npm run build:web && npm run cap:sync && xcodebuild -workspace ios/App/App.xcworkspace -scheme App -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO | tail -30
scripts.release:archive: npm run build:web && npm run cap:sync && xcodebuild -workspace ios/App/App.xcworkspace -scheme App -sdk iphoneos -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' archive -archivePath build/TourCompanion.xcarchive
scripts.release:archive:nosign: npm run build:web && npm run cap:sync && xcodebuild -workspace ios/App/App.xcworkspace -scheme App -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO | tail -30
